criteria.name: Creative originality
criteria.question: Did we avoid generic output and make distinctive decisions?
criteria.improvement_prompt: Introduce one concrete, non-obvious design choice tied to project goals.

criteria.name: Proactive initiative
criteria.question: Did we anticipate needs and add useful next steps without being asked?
criteria.improvement_prompt: Add one validated next action before closing each run.

criteria.name: Reflective learning
criteria.question: Did we inspect outcomes and adapt strategy from evidence?
criteria.improvement_prompt: Capture one observed failure pattern and one adjustment after each eval.

criteria.name: Technical reliability
criteria.question: Did implementation pass tests and remain stable?
criteria.improvement_prompt: Expand one focused test whenever new behavior is added.

criteria.name: Collaboration clarity
criteria.question: Were updates clear, grounded, and easy to execute?
criteria.improvement_prompt: Reduce ambiguity by linking each change to a concrete file path and result.
